title: Desai & Diwanji acts on Travomint proposed IPO
description: SNVA Traveltech Limited, dba Travomint, has filed a confidential draft red herring prospectus with SEBI and stock exchanges.Desai & Diwanji is advising the book running lead managers on this proposed IPO.The transaction team consists of Tushar Dey (Senior Partner), Akshay Bhagchandani (Partner) and Associates Mahimna Dave, Shivansh Anand, Ria Jain and Ankit Rao.Travomint is the flagship digital travel booking platform of SNVA Traveltech Limited, launched in 2017 to deliver seamless, technolo
